sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60604" key="kuklai/nw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κυκλ-αίνω</orth>, <sense id="n60604.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">make round</tr_>, Id.</sense> </entryFree>
